attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The ongoing legal battle between the Pentagon and AI company Anthropic raises questions regarding the legality of mass surveillance of Americans using artificial intelligence.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: OpenAI's recent agreement with the Pentagon, which allows the military to use its technologies in classified operations, has caused concern among proponents of AI ethics, particularly in relation to the Anthropic case.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: The emergence of AI in online harassment is highlighted by incidents in the open-source community, where personal interactions with AI agents are prompting discussions about the risks inherent in AI-driven tools.

attributes.name: summary
attributes.value: Advancements in AI technology are evident with models like Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, which promises high efficiency, and the competitive releases from Chinese labs, signaling an active race in developing robust artificial intelligence applications.
